questions: fiber e ki unlimited data thake?
fiber cable cut hole ki hobe?
broadband theke fiber e switch korbo
fiber er moddhe best plan konta?
fiber er ONU device ta ki?
answers: Haan, ISP Digital fiber optic connection provide kore! FTTH (Fiber to the Home) technology te direct apnar ghore porjonto fiber cable ase. Fastest ar most reliable connection!

Fiber vs broadband: Fiber e light diye data transfer hoy — tai speed onek beshi (up to 1 Gbps) ar latency onek kom. Traditional broadband copper cable use kore jar speed ar reliability fiber er cheye kom.
FTTH mane 'Fiber to the Home' — mane fiber optic cable direct apnar apartment ba bari porjonto ase. ISP Digital er FTTH service e apni guaranteed high speed ar stable connection paben!
ISP Digital er fiber plan 50 Mbps theke 1 Gbps porjonto ache. Fiber e unlimited data thake shob plan e. Price start hoy 1200 taka/month theke.

ONU (Optical Network Unit) holo fiber connection er device ja apnar ghore install hoy. Eta fiber signal ke ethernet signal e convert kore. ISP Digital free ONU provide kore new fiber connection er shathe!
Fiber cable cut hole panic korben na — ISP Digital er emergency team ke call korun 09612-000000 e. Fiber splice korar special equipment lagey, amader team 4-8 ghontar moddhe fix kore dey.
Broadband theke fiber e switch korte ISP Digital app ba office e request korun. Migration FREE — kono extra charge nai! Shudhu installation schedule fix korte hobe ar apni ready.
GPON (Gigabit Passive Optical Network) holo ISP Digital er fiber technology. Ekta single fiber cable theke multiple connection share hoy efficiently. Speed ar reliability duita te top-notch!
Fiber connection onek reliable — brishti, badal, lightning kono kichuteii speed e impact hoy na (copper cable te hoy). ISP Digital er fiber network er uptime 99.9%!
1 Gbps fiber plan ache ISP Digital te — price masik 5000 taka. Content creators, large families, ar tech enthusiasts er jonno perfect. Ar shathe unlimited data ar static IP free!
